name: cine-verse
description: Sistema moderno de gestión de taquilla cinematográfica - ADSO SENA

scripts.client: cd client && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.server: cd server && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.start: cd server && npm install && npm run start
scripts.build: NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION=false npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client

author: Giseella Sanchez Rico
